name: Signicast
description: Signicast specializes in investment casting, offering over 150 alloys and advanced facilities that enable rapid prototyping and delivery. With over 50 years of experience, they address manufacturing challenges, making them a key partner for industries like automotive and medical.

name: Invest Cast
description: Invest Cast Inc is a leading manufacturer specializing in investment metal castings for various materials, including aluminum and steel. With over 40 years of experience, they offer rapid prototyping and high-quality production castings, utilizing advanced technologies to ensure exceptional quality and efficiency.

name: Investacast
description: Investacast is a prominent global supplier of investment castings, offering a comprehensive manufacturing and supply process. With over 50 years of experience, they provide high-quality engineering solutions for various sectors, including aerospace and automotive.

name: Pilot Ferrocast Private Limited
description: Pilot Ferrocast Pvt Ltd specializes in investment casting, offering both ferrous and non-ferrous castings that meet various international standards. With over 15 years of experience, the company provides custom-designed solutions, emphasizing efficiency and quality in their casting processes.

name: Impro Precision Industries
description: Impro is a leading global manufacturer that specializes in precision investment casting, among other casting and machining processes. The company offers comprehensive solutions throughout the product life cycle, ensuring high-quality components for various critical markets.

name: Materion
description: Materion highlights that investment casting technology offers a cost-effective alternative to machining, providing unique qualities for optimized performance and expanding options for demanding material needs.

name: Zetwerk
description: Zetwerk is a specialized manufacturer of custom investment cast components, utilizing a variety of ferrous and non-ferrous alloys to ensure high quality. They also offer secondary operations like finish machining and surface treatment, making them a comprehensive partner for investment casting needs.

name: Captain Technocast Limited
description: Captain Technocast Limited specializes in manufacturing and supplying a wide range of casting products, including those for automotive and aerospace applications. The company utilizes advanced manufacturing technologies and maintains high standards, making it a key player in the investment casting sector.

name: Precision Castings of Tennessee
description: Precision Castings of Tennessee Inc. is a specialist in investment casting foundry services, offering a diverse selection of alloys and precision castings that ensure high-quality and cost-effective metal solutions. The company emphasizes "NetShape" castings, reducing the need for secondary processing and providing comprehensive design and engineering support for investment casting.

name: Investment Casting Supplies Ltd
description: Investment Casting Supplies specializes in providing a wide range of metal casting supplies and equipment specifically for the investment casting and precision casting sectors. They offer innovative solutions such as 3D-printed wax patterns that enhance efficiency in the lost wax casting process.
